title: Kwalee studio closes and lays off entire Luna Abyss team one month after launch
summary: The team behind the acclaimed cosmic shooter Luna Abyss was laid off less than a month after the title's launch on Game Pass, in a new blow to the industry.

title: Microsoft announces Hellblade 3 to try to sell Ninja Theory while planning its closure
summary: Reports indicate that Microsoft already had plans to close Ninja Theory when it announced its new game at Summer Game Fest to attract buyers, sparking outrage in the industry.

title: The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales receives mixed reviews upon launch
summary: The classic-style RPG is praised for its combat and emotional depth, though several critics point out shortcomings in other aspects of the game, receiving varied scores.

title: Multiple Xbox studios negotiate with Microsoft to avoid closure after wave of layoffs
summary: The industry reacts to reports that several Xbox Game Studios teams, including Double Fine, are in active negotiations to avoid being closed.

title: European Commission rejects legislation on 'Stop Killing Games' but campaign will continue
summary: The petition to prevent video games from becoming inaccessible suffered a setback in the EU, although the organizers plan to continue with the initiative.

title: Guild Wars 3 promises no battle passes or hidden subscriptions
summary: Guild Wars 3 developers criticize the monetization model of games as a service, stating that many hide mandatory subscriptions under the guise of battle passes.

title: Overwatch 2 launches season 3 with new hero Shion and Tokyo map
summary: Overwatch 2's third season introduces the character Shion, the Neon Junction map, gameplay improvements, and a new themed battle pass.

title: Pokémon Champions officially launches on mobile devices with a major update
summary: The new Pokémon battle game is now available on Android and iOS, bringing with it the mega evolutions from Pokémon Legends: Z-A and balance adjustments.

title: Nintendo updates original Switch eShop for the first time in years, improving speed
summary: The new firmware update for Nintendo Switch not only brings new features, but a noticeably faster eShop on the original console model.

title: Media outlets highlight their favorite demos and news from the June Steam Next Fest
summary: Kotaku, PC Gamer, and 3DJuegos publish guides and lists with the best available demos to help players navigate the extensive catalog of the event.

title: Leaks and theories point to a possible 'WoW Classic Remix' called 'Camelot'
summary: While Blizzard continues its crackdown on private servers, dataminers believe they have found evidence of a new remix version of WoW Classic under the codename Camelot.

title: Housemarque responds to slower sales of Saros and compares itself to FromSoftware
summary: The Finnish studio is confident that Saros will follow the path of Returnal and Dark Souls, educating the market to establish itself as a cult franchise in the long term.

title: Assassin's Creed Shadows offers a free weekend and receives a major content update
summary: Ubisoft allows players to play Assassin's Creed Shadows for free for a limited time while rolling out a patch with new missions and features.

title: Dave the Diver releases the 'In the Jungle' DLC accompanied by a live-action short film
summary: The successful management and ocean exploration game expands its universe with a jungle adventure and a peculiar short film by the studio behind Sharknado.

title: Sega creates a life-size Sonic figure containing his DNA in a Chaos Emerald
summary: Sega surprises the collector's world by announcing a life-size Sonic figure with a capsule of his DNA inside a replica of the Chaos Emerald.

title: Xbox confirms Gears of War: E-Day will be exclusive to its platforms with no time limit
summary: While an analyst suggests exclusivity will hurt its sales, Microsoft assures that the game will not come to other platforms in the future, contradicting multiplatform rumors.

title: Warframe expands the emotional story of Jade Shadows with the new Constellations mission
summary: Digital Extremes releases the continuation of the acclaimed Jade Shadows mission, adding new narrative choices and rewards that explore the character's story.

title: Square Enix reveals new details of Final Fantasy VII Revelation: airships and Queen's Blood
summary: Naoki Hamaguchi explains the meaning of the subtitle 'Revelation' and new air exploration mechanics are shown, along with the return of the popular card minigame.

title: Rockstar gives next-gen GTA V upgrade for free to PS4 and Xbox One players
summary: Starting June 18, owners of GTA V on previous-generation consoles can upgrade for free to the enhanced version for PS5 and Xbox Series X/S.

title: Hacker group steals Nintendo employee data and demands $2 million ransom
summary: Nintendo confirms it is aware of a security incident where a group of cybercriminals allegedly accessed private employee information through an external provider.
